name: cranes
author: tehn
description: Two-voice varispeed softcut looper. Mirrored and independent playheads with reversing, rate control, and crossfade.

compat.notes: Fully compatible — uses only softcut, screen, clock, and params.

name: reels
author: tehn
description: Four-track tape-style softcut looper. Record, overdub, and play back loops with independent rate and position control.

compat.notes: Fully compatible — softcut-based with no engine dependency.

name: awake
author: tehn
description: Generative polyphonic step sequencer. Four euclidean rhythm lanes that mutate and interact. Classic norns script.

compat.notes: Fully compatible. PolyPerc engine is approximated by sonic-pi-beep (scsynth WebAssembly). Place a compiled PolyPerc.scsyndef in engines/ for full fidelity.

name: orca
author: hundredrabbits
description: Esoteric programming language for live MIDI sequencing. Each letter is an operator that generates, transforms, and routes MIDI data on a 2D grid.

compat.notes: Fully compatible — pure MIDI sequencer with screen display, no engine dependency.

name: arcologies
author: tyleretters
description: Cellular automata sequencer for MIDI and modular. Draw structures on a grid to generate evolving sequences.

compat.notes: Fully compatible — MIDI sequencer with screen, no engine dependency.

name: cheat codes 2
author: dndrks
description: Live softcut sampler and looper with a grid-focused interface. Record, slice, and remix audio in real time.

compat.notes: Core softcut recording and playback work. Grid hardware integration and some advanced features are unavailable in norns-web.

name: compass
author: 21echoes
description: Generative sequencer built around a set of user-defined rules. Evolving patterns with probabilistic step behavior.

compat.notes: Sequencer and MIDI output work. Audio engine voices are unavailable — use with an external MIDI synth.

name: flora
author: scanner-darkly
description: Cellular automata sequencer using Conway's Game of Life rules to generate MIDI patterns. Patterns evolve, loop, and die.

compat.notes: Fully compatible — MIDI sequencer with screen display.

name: molly the poly
author: tehn / sixolet
description: Paraphonic synthesizer voice with classic analog parameters. LFO, filter, envelope, and arpeggiator.

compat.notes: MollyThePoly engine is approximated by sonic-pi-prophet (subtractive poly, scsynth WebAssembly). LFO and arpeggiator work. Place a compiled MollyThePoly.scsyndef in engines/ for full fidelity.

name: timber player
author: markwheeler
description: Sample player with per-sample pitch, filter, envelope, and LFO. Load audio files and play them chromatically via MIDI.

compat.notes: Script loads and params initialize. Audio playback requires Timber SuperCollider engine — use softcut-based playback or external samplers as a workaround.

name: stjonn
author: tehn
description: Six-voice polyphonic string synthesizer. Physically modeled string tones with delay and reverb.

compat.notes: No built-in approximation for StJonn engine. Compile Engine_StJonn.sc → StJonn.scsyndef and place it in engines/ to enable audio. Script logic and UI work regardless.

name: boing
author: tehn
description: Physics-based synthesis. Bouncing ball model driving a resonant synthesis engine.

compat.notes: No built-in approximation for Boing engine. Compile Engine_Boing.sc → Boing.scsyndef and place it in engines/ to enable audio. Script logic and UI work regardless.

name: mx.synths
author: bobbykitten
description: A collection of 14 polysynth engines with a unified interface. Heavy SuperCollider synthesis.

compat.notes: All synthesis requires mx.synths SuperCollider engines. No audio output in norns-web.
